old_value: {"id":"smallhold-3wg9","title":"Inbox signature verification does not require digest in signed headers","description":"In inbox.rs verify_and_fetch_actor(), after parsing the Signature header, there is no check that sig_params.headers_list contains 'digest'. A remote server can send a valid signature that covers only (request-target) and host, omitting the digest header. This allows body substitution: an attacker can replace the activity JSON body without invalidating the signature. Fix: after parsing sig_params, reject if \\!sig_params.headers_list.contains('digest').","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T18:24:03.287897251Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T18:24:03.287897251Z","labels":["codereview"]}
